summary: WM Finance Post-Refactoring Verification Complete. All backend endpoints (28 tests) and frontend navigation (11 pages) working correctly after monolithic server.py (4251 lines) was split into modular routes/, services/, database.py, auth.py, models.py structure. Adesk migration infinite loop fix verified in code review.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width=-1, height=-1) from Recharts library when components render before layout - cosmetic only, charts display correctly

passed_tests: Backend: Root API endpoint - returns version 2.0.0
Backend: Login with admin/220066mm - 200 OK, role=superadmin
Backend: Invalid login credentials - correctly returns 401
Backend: GET /api/accounts - returns list of accounts
Backend: GET /api/analytics/summary - returns income, expense, profit, accounts
Backend: GET /api/analytics/balance - balance report with net_worth
Backend: GET /api/notifications - returns notifications with unread_count
Backend: GET /api/adesk/drafts - returns drafts and stats
Backend: POST /api/ai/chat - AI endpoint responds (Claude Sonnet configured)
Backend: GET /api/bot/summary - endpoint exists (returns 401 for invalid token)
Backend: GET /api/backup/status - Google Sheets status endpoint
Frontend: Login page loads with WM logo and 'Made by Knyazev' badge
Frontend: Login with admin/220066mm redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows income 36,292 zł, profit, accounts
Frontend: Transactions page loads with filtering options
Frontend: Integrations page loads with Telegram settings
Frontend: Adesk Migration page loads with test connection button
critical_code_review_comments: Adesk migration infinite loop bug fix confirmed: seen_ids tracking added in routes/adesk.py lines 103, 152-165 to prevent duplicate page processing
Modular structure validated: server.py is now 136 lines aggregating 15 route modules + 1 service router
All route modules properly exclude MongoDB _id field with {'_id': 0} projection

mocked_apis.Telegram API: Real API - test-connection sends actual message
mocked_apis.AI Chat: Real API - uses Claude Sonnet via emergentintegrations

context_for_next_testing_agent: Major backend refactoring validated. Original 4251-line server.py split into: routes/ (auth, accounts, categories, directions, contractors, transactions, planned_payments, projects, documents, notifications, analytics, adesk, integrations, ai, bot), services/ (google_sheets, telegram, balance, database), database.py, auth.py, models.py. All 28 backend endpoints and 11 frontend pages tested and working. Adesk migration infinite loop bug fixed via seen_ids tracking.
